raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Wiſſi Putni appakſch
Debbes mahjoja uſ winna no
krittuſchu Zelnu/un wiſſi Sweh-
ri Laukā bija uſ winna Sar-
reem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tadeht ka nekahdeem pee
Uhdens dehſiteem Kohkeem buhs
leppoht ſawa Augſtuma pehz/
neds ſawu Wirſ-Gallu pahr to
efino Sarro Widdu iſſteepṭ/ un
nekahdi no Uhdens flazzinati
Kohkt uſ ſew paſcheem palai-
chahs ſawa Augſtuma deht/ jo
tee tohp wiſſi tai Nahwei no-
döhti uſ to Senmes Appak-
chu/ widdu ſarp teem Zilweka
Behrneem/ pee teem/ kas Bedrē
nogrimſt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta ſakka tas Kungs
RUNGS: Tai Deenā/ kad tas
Ellē nogrimme/ tad darriju es
Behdaschanu/ eſ apklahju wiſ-
aa deht tohe Dſikumus/ un at-
ahivu winna Straumes no
ecm/ un tee warreni Uhdens
appe aiſturreti/ un eſ darriju
o Lihbannu winna deht apmel-
ejschn/ un wiſſi Tihruma Koh-
i nokalte winna deht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "No Braſchkeschanas
vinna Krijchanas darriju ee
obs Pagarus drebbaṃ/ kad ee
vinnu Ellē nogruhdu/ar teem/
as Bedrē nogrimſt. Un wiſſi
Kohki eekſch Eedenes/ tee iſweh-
eti un labbai no Lihbanus/wiſ-
i no Uhdens flazzinati Kohki
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tee paſchi nogrimme ar-
ritſan ar winnu Ellē/ pee teem
ar Sohbina Nokanteem/ tapehz
ka tee appakſch winna Elkona
Pawehna biſ fehdejschi ſarp
teem Paganeem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kurrani tu tad eſſi lihdi
ar Godu un Augſtunu ſarp
Eedenes Kohkeem? ir tu tapſi no-
gruhſis ar teem Eedenes Koh-
keem uſ Senmes appakſchu/ tu
gulleſi widdu ſarp teem Ne-ap-
graisiteem/ pee teem/ kaſ zaur
Sohbinu nokanti irr. Tas irr
Warauſ un wiſſa winna Drau-
dse/ ſakka tas Kungs RUNGS.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta XXXII. Nodalla.
Irr weenadi Wahrdi ar tahs 29/ 30/ 31.
Nodatta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "N diwipadeſinitā Gad-
da/ diwipadeſinitā Meh-
nesi/ pirnuā Deenā tahs
Mehnes/ notikfe ta KUNGA
Wahrdē uſ man/ kaſ fazzija:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tu Zilweka Behrus/ fabz
weenu Rauda-Dſeſimu prett
Waraii to Eqiptes Rehnau/ un
fakki uſ winnu : Tu biji weenam
jannam Lauwam lihdi ſarp teem
Baganeem/ un tu biji ka Juu-
kas Swehrē Inbrē/ un iſlehzi
tawas Uppēs/ un ſajanzi to Uh-
deni ar tawahm Rahjabim/ un
darriji winna Uppes duhnatais.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta ſakka tas Kungs
RUNGS: Es iſplehtischu ta-
deht ſawu Tihkli pahr tevi/zaur
Do 3
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
